files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,98 @@
+name: CI
+
+on:
+  push:
+    branches: [main, master]
+    paths:
+      - grammar.js
+      - src/**
+      - test/**
+      - bindings/**
+      - examples/**
+      - tree-sitter.json
+  pull_request:
+    paths:
+      - grammar.js
+      - src/**
+      - test/**
+      - bindings/**
+      - examples/**
+      - tree-sitter.json
+
+concurrency:
+  group: ${{github.workflow}}-${{github.ref}}
+  cancel-in-progress: true
+
+jobs:
+  test:
+    name: Test parser
+    runs-on: ${{matrix.os}}
+    strategy:
+      fail-fast: false
+      matrix:
+        os: [ubuntu-latest, macos-latest, windows-latest]
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+      - name: Set up tree-sitter CLI
+        uses: tree-sitter/setup-action/cli@v2
+      - name: Validate queries
+        shell: bash
+        run: |
+          if [ ! -d queries ]; then
+            echo "No queries directory; skipping validation"
+            exit 0
+          fi
+          tree-sitter build
+          LIB=$(find build -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -name '*tree-sitter-tql*.so' -o -name '*tree-sitter-tql*.dylib' -o -name '*tree-sitter-tql*.dll' \) | head -n1)
+          if [ -z "$LIB" ]; then
+            echo "Failed to locate compiled parser library" >&2
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          SAMPLE=$(find examples -type f -name '*.tql' | head -n1)
+          if [ -z "$SAMPLE" ]; then
+            echo "No sample .tql file found for query validation" >&2
+            exit 1
+          fi
+          while IFS= read -r query; do
+            echo "Checking $query"
+            tree-sitter query "$LIB" "$query" "$SAMPLE" >/dev/null
+          done < <(find queries -type f -name '*.scm' | sort)
+      - name: Run parser and binding tests
+        uses: tree-sitter/parser-test-action@v2
+        with:
+          test-rust: true
+          test-node: true
+          test-python: true
+          test-go: true
+          test-swift: true
+      - name: Parse sample files
+        uses: tree-sitter/parse-action@v4
+        id: parse-files
+        with:
+          files: examples/**
+      - name: Upload failures artifact
+        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
+        if: "!cancelled() && steps.parse-files.outcome == 'failure'"
+        with:
+          name: failures-${{runner.os}}
+          path: ${{steps.parse-files.outputs.failures}}
+  fuzz:
+    name: Fuzz scanner
+    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
+    steps:
+      - name: Checkout repository
+        uses: actions/checkout@v4
+        with:
+          fetch-depth: 2
+      - name: Check for scanner changes
+        id: scanner-check
+        run: |-
+          if git diff --quiet HEAD^ -- src/scanner.c; then
+            printf 'changed=false\n' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          else
+            printf 'changed=true\n' >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
+          fi
+      - name: Run the fuzzer
+        uses: tree-sitter/fuzz-action@v4
+        if: steps.scanner-check.outputs.changed == 'true'
